docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF ALEX MORA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JOYCE MORA. DEFENDANT LEO MORA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MORA, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, LEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, LEO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORA, ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORA, LEO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, RELYING ON TOTALITY OF EVIDENCE THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT LEO MORA CLAIMS OF GRAND THEFT TO THE ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES & SFPD AGAINST PLAINTIFF ALEX MORA ARE FALSE (LITIGATION PRIVILEGE N/A) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
